_review_notes: platform.silicon[0].pcie_address — '00:01.0' is a placeholder; replace with the actual NPU PCIe BB:DD.F address from the platform reference design

components — mirrors the current fbcode/fboss/platform/configs/icecube/fw_util.json. If icecube800bc actually has additional firmware components (e.g. fan_cpld, smb_fpga, psu) that aren't yet in fw_util.json, add them to BOTH this spec AND the platform's fw_util.json. (Note: pre-flight does NOT cross-check fw_util.json — that gate was deferred; the spec is the source of truth for the orchestrator.)
components[*].location and display_location — best-effort placeholders inferred from component name conventions; confirm against the actual icecube800bc reference design
components[*].field_replaceable — confirm each setting matches the actual chassis design

components[7].pic_cpld.firmware.priority=8 — matches fw_util.json's pic_cpld1 priority. Note: fw_util.json has pic_cpld1=8 and pic_cpld2=9 (different priorities for the two instances). If this is a true shared-image case, fw_util.json should be updated so both instances have the same priority.

no pcie_address fields populated yet — add per-component PCIe addresses (BB:DD.F format) for any component that appears on the PCIe bus (typically FPGAs and the NPU); Phase 5 aggregates these into PCI_DEVICES_BY_PLATFORM
components[*].firmware.shared_with_platforms — populate if any of these firmware images are also installed on a sibling platform; otherwise leave as empty list
